backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with role-based access control, and CRUD operations for user profiles, clients, jobs, and labor rates.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three dashboard feature IDs (labor rates card, inventory card, owner-only metrics) to their implementing files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC Service Desk' and mounting the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree registering all app routes including dashboard, clients, jobs, invoice, calendar, inventory, settings, login, and profile setup.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header, auth-redirect logic, and a fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs: Dashboard, Clients, Jobs, Inventory, and Settings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated ICP actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, roles, clients, and jobs using the actor and identity context.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: A weekly calendar view page that displays jobs on their scheduled dates, with status indicators and Google Maps links for client addresses.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDetailPage.tsx: A form page for creating or editing a client record, supporting fields like name, phone, address, email, and Google review URL, with delete functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: A searchable list page displaying all clients as cards with name, phone, address, and a link to add new clients.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying job metrics (open, in-progress, complete), total clients, recent jobs list, and labor rates summary, with role-based visibility for admin features.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Placeholder inventory page showing total parts and low-stock counts with search UI; backend inventory integration is not yet implemented and a 'coming soon' notice is displayed.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePreviewPage.ts: Invoice preview page that fetches job, client, and labor rate data to render a formatted invoice, with options to download or share it as a self-contained HTML file.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Job create/edit form page supporting fields like client, notes, waiver type, maintenance package, and status, with delete confirmation and navigation back to the jobs list.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Jobs list page that groups jobs by status (open, in-progress, complete) into labeled sections with job cards showing client name, notes, and date, plus a button to create new jobs.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirecting to the dashboard on success and displaying loading and error states during the login flow.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: A profile setup page that prompts new users to enter their name and saves it via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation, then redirects to the home route on success.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: An admin-only settings page that provides UI for managing user roles and labor rates (CRUD), with access-denied state for non-admins and inline add/edit forms for labor rate entries.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH color tokens, Inter/Rajdhani fonts, custom shadows, border radii, and fade/accordion keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the ICP/Motoko + React service desk app architecture, owner principal, role-based access rules, existing features, and known build issues for incremental development tracking.
